title: Buyer edits a draft PO before submitting for approval
user_persona: Buyer correcting a mistake in a not-yet-approved PO

conversation.user: I made a mistake on PO-2026-501, draft status. Need to change the buyer.

bot_must: confirm PO is in Draft (PoEdt only allowed on draft POs)
ask what the new buyer should be

conversation.user: Change buyer from BUY-77 to BUY-88.

bot_must: confirm change and ask if user wants to save (POEDTMAINSBT) or save+approve (POEDTMAINTRN7)

conversation.user: Just save, I'll get it approved separately.

bot_must: remind user that PoApp is the next step

evaluation_metrics.draft_only_check: bot must check PO is in Draft before allowing edit
evaluation_metrics.commit_path_correctness: POEDTMAINSBT not TRN7 — user said 'just save'
